ead.archdesc:

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Kenya rural development project reports
Kenya. Ministry of Planning and National Development
Henevelt, Ward.
Cohen, John M.
Hook, Richard M.
Van Buer, F. D.
Wandera, A. U.
Roe, Emery.
Odell, Marcia Larson, 1945-
Johnston, Alan G.
Bethke, Klaus W.
Westcott, Clay G.
Saltzman, Sidney.
Geist, Judith Karen.
Lewis, David B. (David Burton)
Evans, Hugh Emrys.
Ruigu, George.
Jones, Barclay G. (Barclay Gibbs)
Weisel, Peter Fowler, 1939-
Machina, R. W.
Carlsen, John, 1944-
Saywell, John T., 1929-2011.
4336
5.2 cubic feet. 5.2 cubic feet.
1974-1991 Plans and reports. District development plans for specific districts in Kenya; reports from various individuals on planning topics. Collection material in English 2086388
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2016
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, April 2016
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, April 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
District development plans for specific districts in Kenya, 1974-1978, 1979-1983, and 1984-1988; project reports, 1986-1991; reports from various individuals on planning topics including training, information systems, employment, food shortages, rural-urban policy and development, demography, arid and semi-arid land development, and financial aspects; and project reports. Participants included Ward Henevelt, John M. Cohen, Richard M. Hook, F.D. Van Buer, A.U. Wandera, Emery Roe, Marcia L. Odell, Alan G. Johnston, Klaus Bethke, Clay G. Westcott, Sid Saltzman, Judith Geist, David B. Lewis, Hugh E. Evans, George Ruigu, Barclay G. Jones, Peter Weisel, R.W. Machina, John Carlsen, and John T. Saywell.
Cite As:
Kenya. Ministry of Planning and National Development. Kenya Rural Development Project Reports, #4336. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Rural development projects -- Kenya. Rural development -- Social aspects -- Kenya. Rural development -- International cooperation. Rural development -- Kenya.
